profile.name: Arvind Singh
profile.tagline: Software engineer building scalable platforms, AI-driven tools, and modern web apps.
profile.bio: I build production-grade backend systems and AI-powered platforms. Experienced in designing scalable APIs, cloud-native architectures, and data pipelines. Currently working on intelligent automation systems using LLMs and distributed systems.

Designed event-driven architecture using AWS services
